app.title: Kolechko
app.loadingFailed: Failed to load data. Check your connection and try again.

home.noDataHint: When your period begins, tap the button below — or add a past date from the calendar.
home.periodOverdueHint: Your period is lasting longer than usual — mark it as ended if bleeding has stopped.
home.cycleDelayedHint: Your period was expected about {{count}} days ago. Log the start if it has begun.
home.periodEndPromptMessage: Today is day {{day}} of your period. Would you like to mark it as ended?

hero.ringAria: Cycle ring — tap for phase legend

phaseHint.menstruation: Your body is renewing. Rest and warmth can make these days gentler.
phaseHint.follicular: Energy often rises — a lovely time for new plans and movement.
phaseHint.ovulation: You’re near peak fertility. Log how you feel if you want clearer patterns.
phaseHint.luteal: A slower season for many. Self-care and sleep matter most now.

dialogs.endPeriodMessage: Mark today’s date as the last day of your period?
dialogs.cancelStartMessage: This removes today’s period start. You can always log it again.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.emptyHint: Mark your first period to see cycle phases and forecasts.
calendar.markPeriodEndFirst: Mark the current period as ended first

history.title: History
history.subtitle: All cycle and symptom records
history.noPeriodsHint: Your cycle history will appear here. Tap + to add the first one.
history.noSymptomsHint: No symptoms logged for this date. Tap + to add.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Cycle and wellness patterns from your logs
analytics.cycleHistoryHint: Length of each cycle and period — recent records
analytics.needMoreData: Log at least 2 periods to unlock charts and richer patterns. Your profile defaults are used until then.
analytics.emptyTitle: Analytics needs a little more history
analytics.insightDefault: Keep logging how you feel — analytics gets more accurate over time.
analytics.insightStable: You have enough data for confident forecasts. Nice work!
analytics.insightIrregular: Your cycle varies noticeably. Worth mentioning to your doctor at your next visit.
analytics.insightMedication: Medication adherence is below 70% — reminders may help you stay on track.
analytics.insightSymptom: You most often log: {{symptom}}. Notice which phases it repeats in.
analytics.phaseCorrelationsHint: What you log most often in each phase based on your records

todayWidget.title: Today
todayWidget.noMedicationsHint: Add medications and reminders using the button on the right

settings.title: Settings

errors.noSessionTelegram: No active session. Please log in via Telegram again.
errors.exportPdfFailed: Could not generate PDF. Please try again.

settings.notifyTimeHint: Notifications are sent within 15 minutes of the selected time
settings.periodDaysHint: For example, if set to 2, the message will arrive 2 days before the expected date
settings.ovulationDaysHint: For example, if set to 1, the message will arrive 1 day before ovulation
settings.timezoneHint: Used to calculate local notification time
settings.medicationsHint: Reminders arrive on selected days of the week at the specified time
settings.exportHint: PDF report is easy to share with your doctor. CSV is for spreadsheets.
settings.exportPdfShared: Done — pick where to save the file
settings.exportPdfSentToChat: Done! The PDF was sent to your chat with @my_cicle_bot — open the bot conversation.
settings.exportPdfSendFailed: Could not send the PDF to chat. You can still Share below.
settings.exportPdfNeedStart: Open @my_cicle_bot and press Start, then request the report again.
settings.exportPdfTelegramHint: The PDF is delivered as a file in your private chat with @my_cicle_bot — more reliable than Mini App downloads.
settings.pdfSentTitle: PDF sent to the bot chat
settings.pdfReadySteps:
1) Tap «Share / Save PDF»
2) Choose Save to Files or Drive
3) Or send it to Saved Messages
settings.pdfSentSteps: Open @my_cicle_bot — the PDF file is there. Forward it to Saved Messages or your doctor.
settings.pdfSentHelp: The file is already in the bot chat. «View report» opens a preview here.
settings.pdfShareFallback: Share sheet didn’t open. Open the bot chat — if no file, press Start and try again.
settings.pdfPreviewHint: Tap Share / Save, then Save to Files.
settings.deleteAllMessage: All your cycles, symptoms, settings and profile will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

doctorReport.title: {{app}} — doctor report
doctorReport.disclaimer: Reference report based on user-logged data. Not a medical diagnosis.

onboarding.subtitle: A calm space to understand your cycle — just a few steps to get started.
onboarding.cycleLengthHint: From the first day of one period to the first day of the next
onboarding.periodLength: How long your period usually lasts
onboarding.periodLengthHint: Most people bleed for 3–7 days — yours may differ
onboarding.lastPeriod: When did your last period start?
onboarding.lastPeriodHint: Skip if you're not sure — you can add it later
onboarding.notificationsHint: Optional alerts for your period and fertile window
onboarding.daysBeforePeriod: Days before your period to notify you
onboarding.daysBeforeOvulation: Days before ovulation to notify you
onboarding.themeHint: You can change this anytime in Settings — we will remember it.

insights.title: Patterns from your logs
insights.disclaimer: Educational patterns only — not a diagnosis or medical advice.
insights.shorterStreak: Your last {{count}} cycles were shorter than your usual average (about {{avg}} days).
insights.longerStreak: Your last {{count}} cycles were longer than your usual average (about {{avg}} days).
insights.stable: Your recent cycles look fairly steady around {{avg}} days.
insights.variable: Cycle length has varied (about {{range}} days) — logging more helps refine forecasts.
insights.periodAvg: Your logged period length averages about {{days}} days.
insights.trendingShorter: Recent cycles trend a bit shorter than your earlier ones.
insights.trendingLonger: Recent cycles trend a bit longer than your earlier ones.
insights.keepLogging: You have {{count}} cycle(s) logged — keep going for clearer patterns.

customSymptoms.title: Custom tags
customSymptoms.howToUse: After adding tags, open Home → log wellbeing → category «My tags». Select tags, set intensity, Save — they appear in Logged today and in exports.
customSymptoms.pickerHint: Tap your tags, set how strong it feels, then Save.
customSymptoms.homeHint: Tap a tag to log it for today
customSymptoms.empty: No custom tags yet — add them in Settings.

partner.title: Partner share
partner.hint: Share a read-only summary (next period, ovulation, phase) — no private notes. Requires consent.
partner.consent: I understand a partner can see forecast dates and phase only, not my notes or symptoms.

calendarExport.periodHint: Forecast from Kolechko — not medical advice.

referral.hint: Share Kolechko. When a friend joins and makes their first Stars purchase, you both get 7 days of Premium.

premium.previewCaption: Deeper charts, custom tags, partner share & more
premium.doctorHint: You have {{credits}} report credit(s). Premium includes unlimited doctor PDFs.
premium.starsHint: Stars are purchased via App Store, Google Play, or @PremiumBot. Digital goods only — no refunds for consumed content per Telegram policy.

doctor_report.title: Full doctor report

gamification.streakHint: Log how you feel each day to keep your streak

disclaimer.title: Important notice
disclaimer.subtitle: Please read before using Kolechko
disclaimer.notMedical: This is not medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical decisions.
disclaimer.body: Kolechko is a personal wellness and cycle-tracking tool. Predictions, fertile windows, and insights are estimates based on the data you enter. They are not a diagnosis, contraception method, or fertility treatment.
disclaimer.point1: Do not rely on this app alone for pregnancy planning or prevention.
disclaimer.point2: If you notice unusual symptoms, severe pain, or irregular bleeding, seek medical care.
disclaimer.point3: You control your data — export or delete it anytime in Settings.
disclaimer.privacyNote: By continuing you confirm you are 16+ (or the age of digital consent in your country) and accept our Privacy Policy and Terms.
disclaimer.acceptCheckbox: I understand this is not medical advice and I accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

privacyBody: Operator: Kolechko Mini App (“we”). Contact: support via the Telegram bot used to open this app.

Data we process: Telegram user id, name/username (if provided by Telegram), cycle dates, symptoms, notes, medication entries, notification preferences, timezone, and purchase metadata (Telegram Stars payment ids). We do not store your card details — Stars payments are handled by Telegram.

Purpose: provide cycle tracking, reminders, analytics, Premium features, fraud prevention, and legal compliance. Legal bases (GDPR): contract performance, legitimate interests (security, product improvement with aggregated stats), and consent where required.

Storage: data is stored in Supabase (EU/US cloud region as configured for the project) and, for offline fallback, on your device (localStorage). Payment events are logged to fulfill digital goods delivery.

Sharing: we do not sell personal data. Processors include Supabase (hosting/DB) and Telegram (auth, payments, messaging). Transfers outside the EEA rely on appropriate safeguards offered by those providers.
Retention: we keep data while your account is active. You may delete all data in Settings; residual backups may be purged within a reasonable period.
Your rights (EEA/UK and similar): access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection. Contact us via the bot. You may lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority.
Minors: the app is not directed at children under 16 (or higher age required by local law).
Security: access is gated by Telegram WebApp auth and row-level security. No method is 100% secure — please protect your device.
termsBody: By using Kolechko you agree to these Terms. The app provides informational cycle tracking only and is not a medical device.
You must be legally able to use Telegram Mini Apps in your country. You are responsible for the accuracy of data you enter.

Premium and one-time products are sold for Telegram Stars (XTR) as digital goods. Prices are shown before purchase. Subscriptions renew per Telegram Stars subscription rules until cancelled in Telegram. Refunds are subject to Telegram’s policies and applicable law.
Referral rewards are promotional, may change, and can be revoked for abuse.
We may modify features, pricing, or these Terms with notice in the app or bot. Continued use after changes means acceptance.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, the app is provided “as is” without warranties of fitness for a particular medical purpose. Our liability is limited to the amount you paid us for Premium in the 3 months before a claim (or zero if free).

Governing law: unless mandatory consumer law says otherwise, disputes are handled under the laws applicable to the operator’s place of establishment, without prejudice to your mandatory rights as a consumer in the EU/UK.

tips.follicular: Energy often rises after your period — a good window for workouts and new plans.
tips.ovulation: Your fertile window is near. Log cervical fluid or mood if that helps you learn your patterns.
tips.luteal: PMS can show up here. Rest, hydration, and noting symptoms help you spot patterns.
tips.menstruation: Warmth, iron-rich foods, and rest can ease period days — listen to your body.
